reviews.author: Sarah Mitchell
reviews.text: Absolutely blown away by the results! My car looks showroom-new. The attention to detail is incredible, and the team was professional from start to finish.
reviews.notes: Own-site testimonial. Rating inferred from own-site context (5-star Google positioning). Bruce Places API retry recommended to corroborate against GBP.

reviews.author: James Chen
reviews.text: Best detailing service I've ever used. The ceramic coating has kept my car looking pristine.
reviews.notes: Ceramic coating-specific — strong for ceramic-service-page pull quote.

reviews.author: Amanda Rodriguez
reviews.text: They came to my house and transformed my vehicle. The convenience and quality are unmatched.
reviews.notes: Mobile-specific — 'came to my house' reinforces the mobile differentiator. Strong for hero pull quote.

reviews.author: David Thompson
reviews.text: Professional, punctual, and thorough. My luxury car has never looked better.
